title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren advocates choosing statically-typed languages like TypeScript over dynamically-typed languages like Python for AI teams, citing faster error detection via LSPs, type checking, and build-time validation. He argues that without these safeguards, AI-assisted coding introduces runtime mistakes that become costly to fix at scale.
